title: Empty State
description: Message shown when no data is available (first-run, zero results, error-recovery entry points). Should be actionable and empathetic.

keyboard: Actions are reachable via Tab and activate with Enter/Space as appropriate.
aria: Use headings (<h2>/<h3>) for the empty state title when appropriate to page structure.
If the empty state appears after filtering, announce result count elsewhere (e.g. "0 results").

must: Empty state must offer a next step (change filters, create item, retry) unless truly read-only.
Copy must be clear and not blame the user.
should: No-results state suggests clearing filters or adjusting search.
Error variant offers retry and/or support link.
must_not: Do not use empty state as a loading placeholder (use skeleton/loading).

token_usage.notes: Use muted foreground for supporting copy.
Use semantic spacing tokens for gaps; adjust per layout.

examples.title: No results empty state
examples.html:
No results

Try clearing filters.
